process.name: WMIC.exe
process.command_line: wmic /namespace:\\root\subscription PATH __EventFilter CREATE Name="WindowsHealthFilter", EventNamespace="root\cimv2", QueryLanguage="WQL", Query="SELECT * FROM __InstanceModificationEvent WITHIN 60 WHERE TargetInstance ISA 'Win32_PerfFormattedData_PerfOS_System'"
